steps.title: Compare words per page
steps.content: A Moment in the Sun has fewer pages but far more words than 1Q84. That means the conclusion must concern word density per page, not translation, reading time, or paper thickness.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice B makes an unsupported claim about translation. Choice C discusses reading time, which is never measured. Choice D concerns paper thickness, which cannot be inferred from only page counts and word counts.

steps.title: Compute the density
steps.content: Choice A follows from the numbers: about 625,000 words over 1,100 pages is roughly 568 words per page, while 407,000 words over 1,157 pages is roughly 352 words per page. The answer is A.
